name: Irish Potato Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the butter into the flour and add a good pinch of salt.
2. Add the mashed potato to the mixture; stir in milk until you have a soft dough.
3. Roll out on a lightly floured surface and cut into rounds, about 3 inches across.
4. Place the rounds on a greased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 425 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 to 20 minutes.
6. Split the cakes; serve hot with butter.
